% auto-generated by scripts/txn-write.mjs — transactional multi-statement write
\begin{table}[htbp]
  \centering
  \caption{Transactional write throughput (req/s) and tail latency (p99, ms) for
    \texttt{POST /threads}, which inserts a post and five comments in a single
    transaction, on PostgreSQL under default durability (50 connections, median of
    5). A representative layer of each tier is shown; the full matrix is left
    to future work. Between-layer spread is $3.3\times$ (Prisma 2412 down to
    MikroORM 740), well below the $6.55\times$ read spread, and the ordering tracks
    the single-row insert, so the write conclusions extend to a multi-statement
    transactional write.}
  \label{tab:txn_write}
  \begin{tabular}{l r r}
    \toprule
    Layer & req/s & p99 (ms) \\
    \midrule
    \texttt{pg} & 2347 & 44 \\
    \texttt{knex} & 2029 & 49 \\
    \texttt{prisma} & 2412 & 41 \\
    \texttt{typeorm} & 1790 & 48 \\
    \texttt{mikroorm} & 740 & 90 \\
    \bottomrule
  \end{tabular}
\end{table}
